gemma_scope_2_270m_it.why_use: Fastest sanity check for the probe workflow.
gemma_scope_2_270m_it.notes: Use when local hardware is weak or when validating notebook logic.

gemma_scope_2_1b_it.why_use: Best first pilot target: small enough to run, instruction-tuned, and has Gemma Scope 2 SAE resources.
gemma_scope_2_1b_it.notes: Good for validating context/constraint feature movement before switching to Chinese-heavy models.

gemma_scope_2_4b_it.why_use: Higher-quality Gemma pilot if GPU memory allows.
gemma_scope_2_4b_it.notes: Use after the 1B workflow is stable.

qwen_scope_qwen3_1_7b_base.why_use: Smallest Qwen-Scope path for Chinese-oriented mechanistic probing.
qwen_scope_qwen3_1_7b_base.notes: Base model is less assistant-like than instruct models but better aligned with available Qwen-Scope SAE resources.

qwen_scope_qwen3_8b_base.why_use: Most relevant target for Chinese music/product phrasing once compute is available.
qwen_scope_qwen3_8b_base.notes: Use after the Gemma/Qwen-1.7B workflow is proven.

qwen_scope_qwen3_5_2b_base.notes: Use if Qwen3.5 model access and local support are smoother than Qwen3.
